kills: EXPERIMENT CANNOT DISCRIMINATE: every probe branch's expected outcome (all pairs FREE) is also the prediction of the simplest null hypothesis (no forcing in lineage-derived unions, already evidenced by L51's exactly-realizable V=1155 C6-closure datum and L57's 2.29M-pair exhaustive freeness). An all-free run 'supports' C1(a) and C3(ii) only vacuously. Worse, the experiment builds only RIGID wall unions while the proposal's own thesis says clamps live on FLEXIBLE strata: the one discriminating test the proposal contains (C2(b), symmetry-extended Maxwell certification of a symmetric flex plus tracking circ_B along it) is absent from the experiment plan. The proposal never tests its own mechanism.

C2 PREDICTION (a) IS A TAUTOLOGY: for an involutive coupling sigma, cross unit pairs come in sigma-pairs {(p, sigma(q)), (q, sigma(p))} plus axis-fixed singles, because |q - sigma(p)| = |sigma(q) - p| for ANY point set whatsoever, chromatic structure irrelevant. Reflective couplings therefore have higher mean corank than rotational ones automatically. Confirming this carries zero evidence for mirror clamps or symmetric flexes.

C3(i) IS MIS-CALIBRATED AGAINST ITS OWN EXPERIMENT: the 'generic transversality cap of 3 = dim of the moduli' belongs to the full 3-parameter E(2) family, but the sweep is a 1-parameter hinge slice where the generic simultaneous-coincidence cap is 1, not 3. And the predicted high-corank locus (rotations at arccos(5/6)-monoid angles about the engine's construction center) can be missed entirely if the 2-3 arbitrarily chosen vertex pivots exclude that center. A 'flat distribution' would not cleanly falsify and a heavy tail would not cleanly confirm as designed.

C1'S SUPPORT COLLIDES WITH LOGGED KILL L52: the 'one extra equation stacked on (n+1)/2 self-stresses would be an unforced miracle' argument is over-determination counting, the exact genre L52 invalidated via P_510 (+1487 surplus, rigid, realizable). The stress-floor lemma is arithmetically correct ((5n-5)/2 edges, (n+1)/2 stresses, verified) but NON-DISCRIMINATING: lineage engines carry ~3n surplus stresses, are rigid, realizable, and exhaustively forcing-free, so 'many self-stresses' implies nothing about needing a flex (Connelly stress-matrix theory says large stress spaces typically ENTRENCH rigidity). C1's only remaining support, the L57 rigid-and-free correlation, is equally explained by the rival null (omega<=3 world, no clamps exist at all), under which C1 is vacuously true. Net independent evidence for C1: zero.

C2'S HEADLINE CLAIM IS FALSE AS STATED: 'within sigma-symmetric families, clamp configurations form an open (positive-measure) condition' is wrong; circ_B = 1 remains codimension 1 in any parameter space, symmetric or not. Only the existence-of-a-crossing is open, and only as a condition on flex FAMILIES. Moreover the mirror stratum buys nothing on Theorem R's two conditions relative to the generic case: per the repo's own W3_CLAMP_REDUCTION.md, for |A| = 2 the center s* is already two discrete choices (two-circle intersection) without any symmetry, circ_B = 1 is already a single equation, and s* != t* is already generic. The only genuine purchase of the mirror stratum is the symmetric flex itself, which the experiment does not construct or test.

C3(ii)'S DERIVATION IS INVALID: a 3-cross-edge interface on 6 distinct boundary vertices carries an S_5-symmetric relation on color TRIPLES (a partition-algebra-type object containing many imprimitive elements), not a single-vertex-port relation, so L55's monoid theorem (proved via 2-transitivity on ordered pairs, width 1 only) does not confine it. The proposal concedes this in how_it_could_be_wrong, which means the load-bearing half of C3 stands on nothing. L57 cannot back it either: L57 classified pairs, never joint triple relations.

THE CHROMATIC CORE OF THE EXPERIMENT RE-RUNS A LOGGED KILL: probing symmetric/rotational multi-copy unions of a lineage engine for forcing is L51's lens-1 idea ('symmetry/redundancy will manufacture forcing'), already negative on the C6 closure of P_510 (1774 pairs, 0 forced, 0 indeterminate). It also runs against the frontier's own conclusion (L57): the missing object must come from a NEW chi-5 UDG built on a different principle, not from unions of lineage copies.

VACUITY STRUCTURE: C1, C2, and C3(ii) all universally quantify over the possibly-empty set of realizable clamps. In the chi=5 world all three are vacuously true, and each 'sharp' falsifier (a rigid clamp, an asymmetric clamp with no symmetric counterpart, a forcing corank-3 wall) requires first exhibiting the very object whose discovery the conjectures were supposed to guide. As stated they are search priors wearing falsifiability costumes.

FEASIBILITY SOFT SPOT ON C1(b): exact rigidity-Jacobian corank in sympy is claimed 'checkable exactly', but for wall unions this means rank of a ~800-column symbolic matrix over a degree-16+ number field tower in pure Python; the repo's own exact-computation ceiling is Groebner at ~14 vertices. C1(b) is practically checkable only for small candidates, not for 397-vertex objects, and the experiment's 'rigid once cross edges are added' premise is asserted, not verified (degenerate corank-1 walls with the cross bar through the pivot are infinitesimally flexible).
prior_art_collisions: Repo L51: the V=1155 C6-closure no-forcing datum already executed and killed the 'symmetric multi-copy unions manufacture forcing' hope that the wall-sweep experiment re-probes.
Repo L52: explicitly invalidated over-determination/DOF counting as a realizability or plausibility heuristic (P_510 at +1487); C1's why_plausible is that exact genre.

Repo L53 (Theorem R, caveat d): already states the degree-5 codim-1 wall is generically unsatisfiable for rigid H-w and is gated on an unproven flex; C1's practical content ('search flexible strata') duplicates L53, so the novelty claim overreaches; only the universal NECESSITY claim ('no rigid clamp, ever') is new, and it is the unsupported part.
Repo L55/L57: the monoid obstruction is proved for width-1 ports only, and the exhaustive freeness result classifies pairs only; C3(ii) stretches both beyond their proofs.

de Grey 2018 / Polymath16: forced-pair plus spindling at the k=4 level (mono-pair forcing exploited via rotation at arccos(5/6)-type arithmetic angles, Minkowski orbit unions) is the existing template for exactly this technology; 'forcing arises at deep arithmetic coincidence strata' is implicit standing practice there, as the proposal partly concedes.

Fowler-Guest 2000 / Schulze symmetry-extended Maxwell counting; Dixon 1899 paradoxical K_{m,n} mechanisms: the symmetric-flex machinery exists and is correctly cited; no chromatic link in that literature, so that part of the novelty claim stands.

Connelly stress-matrix / super-stability theory: large self-stress spaces typically certify MORE rigidity (universally rigid tensegrities), directly opposing C1's 'stress floor pushes toward flexes' rhetoric.

Chilakamarri (L^infty chi=4): supplies a control world where cocircularity walls degenerate to positive-dimensional center families (realization maximally easy) yet top-level clamps are impossible for chromatic reasons; this refutes the inference pattern 'looser realization conditions make clamps plausible' that powers C2's why_plausible, even though the formal detector passes.
result.surviving_kernel: The lens survives: Theorem R turns W3 into wall-crossing on the moduli of engine realizations, and L53 already gates the codim-1 wall on a flex, so 'search positive-dimensional strata, not rigid points' is the right working prior even though its claimed necessity proof is hollow. Four concrete new items survive the attack: (1) C1(b) as a cheap necessary-condition VERIFIER on any future clamp candidate (continuous flex implies infinitesimal flex implies rigidity corank >= 4); (2) C2(b)'s constructive route to paradoxically flexible over-braced UNIT frameworks (mirror doubles of small engines joined along axis-fixed vertices, certified by the exact symmetry-extended Maxwell character count), the only mechanism-level testable claim in the proposal; (3) the corank census over the FULL 3-parameter E(2) moduli as new descriptive structure, including the arithmetic-support conjecture (never measured, cheap, true-or-false regardless of chromatic payoff); (4) the width-3 imprimitivity question: whether a 3-cross-edge interface between two forcing-free engines can carry an imprimitive boundary TRIPLE relation, genuinely open because L55 covers width 1 and L57 covers pairs only, and answerable by SAT without any geometry.
result.cheapest_decisive_test: Mechanism test, afternoon scale, <= 30 vertices: take a small over-braced unit framework (fused Moser spindles or a triangular-lattice patch), build the sigma-invariant mirror double joined along axis-fixed vertices, compute the symmetry-extended Maxwell count exactly in sympy (tiny character computation) to certify or refute a symmetric flex, and if it flexes, numerically sweep the flex while tracking circ_B of a chosen 3-subset for a sign change through 1. No symmetric flex in any small mirror-doubled unit framework kills the C2 mechanism outright; a circ_B crossing yields the first explicit Theorem-R-geometry realization. Companion test for the other kernel half: fix one abstract 3-cross-edge interface between two S199 copies and enumerate the realized relation on 5^3 boundary color triples by a few thousand SAT solves, then test imprimitivity; primitive output extends L55 to width 3 (a new logged kill), imprimitive output makes route (ii) concrete. Both run on the existing python-sat + sympy stack.
result.steelman: Drop the wall sweep's chromatic claims and the necessity rhetoric; keep the stratification program in this form. (1) Adopt flexibility as a search FILTER justified by L53(d) and economy, not by the stress floor: rigid strata are exhaustively dead empirically (L57) and unsearchable for miracles, so all search budget goes to positive-dimensional strata; record C1(b) (corank >= 4 at any claimed clamp realization) as a standing verifier check, valid because continuous flexes imply infinitesimal ones. (2) Make C2(b) the experiment: systematically construct sigma-invariant over-braced unit frameworks (mirror doubles of small lineage fragments joined along axis-fixed vertices), certify symmetric flexes with the exact symmetry-extended Maxwell count, and sweep each flex tracking circumradius of every 3-subset of candidate interface vertices for IVT crossings of 1; each crossing is an explicit engine realization satisfying Theorem R's geometry with both centers on the axis and s* != t* a checkable sign condition. Only then ask SAT whether any K4-free 6-critical H matches the realized interface. (3) Attack the genuinely open combinatorial gap directly and abstractly: classify S_5-symmetric boundary relations realizable by 3-edge interfaces between forcing-free engines (SAT enumeration of triple relations); an imprimitivity finding would be the first post-L55 positive structure, a primitivity proof would be a publishable width-3 extension of the monoid obstruction. (4) Keep the corank census as a cheap descriptive by-product, but over full E(2) (3 parameters) with the construction center forced into the pivot set, and state the reflective-coupling prediction modulo the automatic sigma-pairing so it has content. This version tests its own mechanism, collides with no logged kill, and every branch produces a logged structural result rather than another all-free null.
